author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/subagent.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Replace every self.agents.lock().ok() / if let Ok(...) = .lock() pattern in BackgroundAgentManager (src/subagent.rs:294-349) and BackgroundAgent (lines 308-310, 318-321, 423-424) with .lock().unwrap_or_else(|poisoned| poisoned.into_inner()) (the project's standard poison-recovery idiom used elsewhere). This makes poisoning recoverable and observable rather than turning every subsequent call into a no-op. Optionally emit a tracing::error! on first observation of a poisoned guard so the panic that caused it is not lost.

**Blocking:** src/subagent.rs is reserved scope. Pair with #401 split.
